name: Continental Airlines, Inc.
description: Continental Airlines, Inc. was a major American airline founded in 1934 and headquartered in Houston, Texas. It operated flights to destinations throughout North America, South America, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific region. Known for its high-quality service and operational efficiency, Continental was a member of the Star Alliance. In 2010, the airline merged with United Airlines, with the combined carrier operating under the United name while retaining Continental's logo and livery.
